summary: Added a brief exit bridge that puts county medics and municipal custody on the platform, strengthening the handoff into Chapter 17's hospital-and-holding-room aftermath without changing Chapter 16's core events.
edits: Inserted one sentence-level bridge near the end of the chapter to show county medical transport arriving for Ivo.
Added municipal cops and paperwork to the same beat so Marisol's later municipal holding-room release feels directly connected.
